text.title: Benefits Realization Examples
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing how the benefits-realization methodology converts inputs into a valid `report` artefact. Trace mirrors the decision-tree example in `06-decision-tree.xml`.

example.setting: A representative case satisfying all `Applies If` preconditions.
example.trace: quantitative_with_owner=true → baseline_pre_golive=true → curve_present=true → M3 measurement → RAG=YELLOW.
